items.title: Basisspeler Teze boekt belangrijke zege met AS Monaco
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zaterdag 31 januari. Blik hier terug op de hoogtepunten van deze dag uit onder meer de Eredivisie, de Premier League, La Liga en de Bundesliga.

items.title: Genius or obvious? Rosenior's subs inspire Chelsea comeback win
items.summary: After Chelsea's first comeback win from two goals down in a Premier League match, were Liam Rosenior's substitutions against West Ham genius or obvious?

items.title: Ekitiké and Wirtz sink Newcastle before Konaté seals welcome Liverpool win
items.summary: You could say Hugo Ekitiké was the one who got away from Newcastle last summer, except there were so many. The Liverpool striker gave Eddie Howe further cause for regret with a gamechanging, match-winning performance at Anfield, however, as Arne Slot’s side found the consistency that has eluded them too often this season to record a second impressive win in succession. Ekitiké struck twice against the club that had agreed a deal to sign him from Eintracht Frankfurt before Liverpool swept in. Their initial outlay of £69m, rising to £79m, is proving money very well spent. Newcastle were the dominant force before Ekitiké’s swift brace transformed the contest. Florian Wirtz added a third in the second half before Ibrahima Konaté, playing for the first time since the death of his father, capitalised on a Nick Pope error to complete an important victory. Konaté was understandably in tears as the moment sunk in. Continue reading...

items.title: Veelbesproken Vaessen de schlemiel bij Groningen: Sparta klimt naar plek vijf
items.summary: Sparta Rotterdam is zaterdag naar plek vijf in de Eredivisie geklommen. Tegen directe concurrent FC Groningen boekte de ploeg van trainer Maurice Steijn de vijfde competitiezege op rij.

items.title: Frenkie de Jong na 'Cruijffiaanse' assist bejubeld bij winnend Barça
items.summary: Barcelona heeft zaterdagavond mede door een bijzonder fraaie assist van aanvoerder Frenkie de Jong afgerekend met Elche. De social media-afdeling van Barça schreef dat de middenvelder zich, in aanloop naar een doelpunt van Ferran Torres, voor even voordeed als Johan Cruijff. Barcelona komt door de winst weer op vier punten van achtervolger Real Madrid, dat zondagmiddag nog in actie komt tegen Rayo Vallecano.

items.title: Ekitike and Wirtz shine as vintage Liverpool return to beat Newcastle
items.summary: Hugo Ekitike scored twice as Liverpool produced one of their most convincing performances of the season to come from behind to beat Newcastle 4-1, rising above Manchester United into fifth in the Premier League table.

items.title: Liverpool beëindigt zegeloze Premier League-reeks via Ekitiké
items.summary: Liverpool heeft zaterdagavond zijn thuisduel met Newcastle United omgezet in een winstpartij. Voor het beëindigen van een zegeloze reeks van vijf duels in de Premier League moest de ploeg van manager Arne Slot met name in de eerste helft diep gaan.

items.title: Conte loopt leeg na zware blessure aanvoerder: 'Dit is zelfmoord'
items.summary: Napoli heeft een moeilijke week zaterdagavond afgesloten met een overwinning op Fiorentina. De zorgen van Antonio Conte zijn echter nog niet voorbij, want aanvoerder Giovanni Di Lorenzo verliet het veld per brancard en heeft waarschijnlijk zijn voorste kruisband afgescheurd. Conte was na afloop dan ook woedend.

items.title: Rosenior hails 'world class' Fernandez in Chelsea comeback
items.summary: Liam Rosenior is full of praise for Chelsea's second-half comeback win against West Ham, singling out matchwinner Enzo Fernandez's performance.

items.title: Rosenior: I hope hiring me is Chelsea's greatest decision
items.summary: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior says fans were right to boo at the end of the first half against West Ham, but hopes that hiring him becomes "the best decision" the club has ever made.

items.title: 0-2 at HT, 3-2 at FT! Chelsea in epic comeback win...
items.summary: Chelsea came from two goals down to seal a remarkable 3-2 victory over relegation-threatened West Ham United on Saturday.

items.title: Arsenal thrash Leeds to reinstate 7-point PL lead
items.summary: Arsenal have reinstated their seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League after a 4-0 win against Leeds United.

items.title: Snoop Dogg wants to make Swansea 'global name'
items.summary: Swansea City investor Snoop Dogg has said he wants to take the side back to the Premier League, and establish them as a 'global name'.

items.title: Messi, CR7 jerseys headline Terry's $695K auction
items.summary: Former England and Chelsea captain John Terry netted $695,000 from a 50-item auction of his personal collection, headlined by match-worn Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo jerseys.

items.title: Wrexham boost PL promotion hopes with 1-0 win
items.summary: Wrexham moved back into the Championship play-off places after their hard- fought 1-0 win over Sheffield Wednesday at Hillsborough.

items.title: Last-gasp Fernandez strike completes Chelsea comeback over West Ham
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Chelsea’s match against West Ham in the Premier League.

items.title: Likened to Mbappe - teenager Kroupi flourishing at Bournemouth
items.summary: Eli Junior Kroupi's stunning goal for Bournemouth against Wolves will help soften the blow of losing Antoine Semenyo to Manchester City.

items.title: Enzo Fernández seals thrilling Chelsea fightback to shatter 10-man West Ham
items.summary: There are times when trying to make sense of Chelsea is a futile task. Lurching between extremes is their speciality. They were shambolic against struggling West Ham for 45 minutes, had Stamford Bridge ready to turn on Liam Rosenior at half-time and still found a way to mount a comeback so wild it left their opponents in a state of utter, uncontrollable rage at the end of an incomprehensible London derby. Where to begin? With the end, perhaps, and Enzo Fernández running on to a cutback from João Pedro to make it 3-2 to Chelsea in the 92nd minute. It was some turnaround. João Pedro had made the difference after coming on at the start of the second half. The forward scored Chelsea’s first, heading home just before the hour, and was cool when he broke into the West Ham area when the game ran into added time. João Pedro had options. He could have shot and he could have crossed. Instead he threw West Ham by pulling the ball back to Fernández, who is beginning to resemble Frank Lampard with his knack of deciding games with late unnoticed runs from midfield. Continue reading...

items.title: 'A great headache' - can Madueke stake claim for Arsenal and England?
items.summary: The sight of Noni Madueke flying past defenders and putting dangerous crosses into the penalty will have been a welcome sight for Mikel Arteta.

items.title: Beto snatches last-gasp equaliser for Everton to spark Moyes sprint and frustrate Brighton
items.summary: David Moyes could not contain himself. As the ball hit the back of the net after the substitute Beto had bundled in the equaliser in the seventh minute of injury time, the Everton manager set off. Moyes is 63 in April, but he sprinted on to the pitch in a moment of sheer delight as Brighton’s players dropped to their knees in despair. Somehow, Everton’s unbeaten record here that stretches back to 2019 is still intact. It had seemed a goal from Pascal Gross would be enough for Brighton to claim victory at the sixth attempt after they had spurned a number of chances in the first half. But while it is one thing to plan how you are going to overcome a team managed by Moyes, it is not quite so easy in practice. Continue reading...
